scripts.dev:agent: cd apps/vos-agent && bun run app/main.ts serve --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8787
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/vos-platform && bun run typecheck && cd ../vos-core && bun run typecheck && cd ../vos-runtime && bun run typecheck && cd ../vos-server && bun run typecheck && cd ../vos-kb && bun run typecheck && cd ../vos-spec && bun run typecheck && cd ../../apps/vos-cli && bun run typecheck && cd ../vos-agent && bun run typecheck && cd ../vos-demo && bun run typecheck && cd ../vos-web && bun run typecheck
scripts.test: cd packages/vos-platform && bun test --pass-with-no-tests && cd ../vos-core && bun test --pass-with-no-tests && cd ../vos-runtime && bun test --pass-with-no-tests && cd ../vos-server && bun test --pass-with-no-tests && cd ../vos-kb && bun test --pass-with-no-tests && cd ../vos-spec && bun test --pass-with-no-tests && cd ../../apps/vos-cli && bun test --pass-with-no-tests && cd ../vos-agent && bun test --pass-with-no-tests && cd ../vos-demo && bun test --pass-with-no-tests && cd ../vos-web && bun test --pass-with-no-tests
scripts.build: cd apps/vos-cli && bun run build && cd ../vos-agent && bun run build && cd ../vos-demo && bun run build && cd ../vos-web && bun run build
